forecast.phase_notice_climatology: Reliable Aug-12 forecast becomes available around Aug 5. Until then, the 10-year August climatology below is your best signal.
forecast.phase_notice_subseasonal: Sub-seasonal probability bands are starting to firm up. The hour-by-hour Aug-12 forecast becomes reliable from Aug 5.
forecast.phase_notice_extended: Daily forecast for Aug 12 is available with low confidence. Confidence narrows over the next week.
forecast.phase_notice_reliable: Hourly Aug-12 forecast is now in the reliable window. The confidence band tightens each day.
forecast.phase_notice_nowcast: Live cloud cover and satellite imagery for the eclipse window.
forecast.climatology_attribution: Climatology: 10-yr ERA5 reanalysis (Aug 12, 17:45 UTC) via Open-Meteo · CC BY 4.0
forecast.climatology_missing: Historical weather data not available for this spot.
forecast.reliable_climatology_disclaimer: local conditions, not the eclipse-day forecast
forecast.reliable_missing: No forecast available for the nearest station right now.
forecast.subseasonal_confidence: Sub-seasonal point estimate · ensemble probability bands available on Pro+
forecast.subseasonal_horizon_too_short: 46-day horizon ends {horizon}. Sub-seasonal data for {target} starts ~Jun 27 (T-46).
forecast.subseasonal_sample_disclaimer: This is the latest available six-hourly slot, not Aug 12.
forecast.extended_layer_low_note: Low clouds block the sun completely.
forecast.extended_layer_mid_note: Mid clouds block the sun completely.
forecast.extended_layer_high_note: High cirrus often still allows viewing.
forecast.extended_confidence: Confidence: low — 7+ day cloud forecasts hit ~50% skill.
forecast.extended_sample_disclaimer: This is the latest available hourly slot, not Aug 12.
forecast.openmeteo_attribution: Weather data by Open-Meteo.com · CC BY 4.0
forecast.horizon_advisory_blocked_body: The sun won't be visible from this spot at totality — terrain is {clearance}° too high. The cloud forecast doesn't change that.
forecast.horizon_advisory_risky_body: Sun barely clears terrain at totality with only {clearance}° margin. Cloud forecast still applies, but the geometry is tight.
forecast.nowcast_no_station: No nearby station data available right now.
forecast.nowcast_attribution: Forecast: Veðurstofa Íslands · Station: {station} · Imagery: EUMETSAT
forecast.upgrade_body_climatology: Pro tracks the forecast for this spot from the moment it becomes meaningful (~T-15) all the way to the live nowcast on eclipse morning. Climatology above stays free.
forecast.upgrade_body_subseasonal: Pro unlocks sub-seasonal probability bands now and the full hour-by-hour forecast as Aug 12 approaches.
forecast.upgrade_body_extended: Pro unlocks the extended Aug-12 forecast plus ensemble probability bands. Hourly reliable window starts ~Aug 5.
forecast.upgrade_body_reliable: Pro unlocks the hour-by-hour Aug-12 forecast at HARMONIE-AROME's 2.5 km native resolution — Iceland's most accurate model for this terrain.
forecast.upgrade_body_nowcast: Pro unlocks live cloud cover, satellite imagery, and decision-support during the eclipse window.

spot_detail.plan_placeholder: Alternates data coming soon — see the Map tab for nearby spots.

historical.title: Historical weather (last 10 years)
historical.chart_aria: Cloud cover per year at 17:45 UTC on Aug 12 — taller bars mean clearer skies
historical.caveat: Based on ERA5 reanalysis at 17:45 UTC on Aug 12 for 2016–2025. Past years are a rough guide only — always check the day-of forecast before planning your eclipse day.

horizon.sun_position: The sun will be at {altitude}° above the horizon, looking {direction}.
horizon.blocked_warning: The sun will NOT be visible from this location during totality. A {height}m obstacle {distance}m to the west blocks the view.
horizon.peakfinder_link: View full mountain panorama on PeakFinder
horizon.peakfinder_subtitle: External site — shows labeled mountain names and distances
horizon.dynamic_offline: Connect to internet for horizon checking
horizon.upgrade_prompt: Unlock horizon checking for any location — Eclipse Pro €9.99
horizon.attribution: Elevation data: ÍslandsDEM v1.0 © National Land Survey of Iceland (CC BY 4.0)
horizon.tooltip_blocked: Terrain blocks the sun here by {degrees}°
horizon.outside_path: This location is outside the path of totality.
horizon.outside_coverage: This location is outside the terrain coverage area.
horizon.click_hint: Tap anywhere on the map to check horizon

weather.title: Live Weather Map
weather.description: Real-time cloud cover from Icelandic weather stations overlaid on an interactive map. See exactly where skies are clear.

recommendations.title: Smart Recommendations
recommendations.description: AI-powered suggestions for the best viewing spot based on weather, traffic, and eclipse geometry. Updated every 15 minutes.

offline.title: Works Offline
offline.description: Download maps and eclipse data before you leave. Full functionality even without cell coverage in the Westfjords.

timeline.title: Eclipse Timeline
timeline.description: Precise contact times for your exact GPS position. Know exactly when to look up, when totality begins, and when it ends.

profiles.photographer: Longest totality + clear skies. Doesn't mind remote spots.
profiles.family: Easy access, services nearby, good cell signal. No difficult trails.
profiles.hiker: Prefers trails and elevation. The harder the hike, the better the spot.
profiles.skychaser: Will drive anywhere for the clearest weather. All about the sky.
profiles.firsttimer: Balanced pick — safe, accessible, good conditions. A great first eclipse.
